name: Digital Products
description: Create once, sell infinitely. Digital products have the highest autonomy potential because fulfillment is fully automated after creation.

name: AI-as-a-Service
description: Package AI capabilities as managed services. Clients pay for outcomes rather than building their own AI infrastructure.

name: Content Automation
description: Automated content generation and distribution across platforms. Revenue scales with audience size and engagement.

name: SaaS / Micro-SaaS
description: Software products solving specific problems with recurring subscription revenue. Micro-SaaS targets narrow niches with high willingness to pay.

name: Marketplace / Platform
description: Connect buyers and sellers in a niche vertical. Revenue grows with network effects as both sides of the marketplace scale.

name: E-Commerce
description: Sell physical or digital products through automated storefronts. Best when combined with print-on-demand or dropshipping to eliminate inventory.

name: AI Trading & Finance
description: AI-driven financial analysis, trading signals, or portfolio management. High reward potential but requires careful risk management and compliance.
